fundamentals.name: ServiceNow, Inc.
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: ServiceNow, Inc. provides cloud-based solution for digital workflows in the North America, Europe, the Middle East and Africa, Asia Pacific, and internationally. The company provides asset management, integrated risk management, IT service management, Operational Technology management, Security Operations, strategic portfolio management, IT operations management products; customer service management product; field service management applications; and sales and order management services. It also offers human resources delivery; legal and contract operations; workplace service delivery products; app engine product; automation engine; platform privacy and security product; and source-to-pay operations. In addition, the company provides RaptorDB, a database built to manage workloads at scale; ServiceNow Impact that provides customers with software tools, guided plans, and AI-driven recommendations; customer support; and workflow data fabric. It serves government, financial services, healthcare and life science, manufacturing, Public Sector, retail, technology, and Telecom sectors through service providers and resale partners. The company has a strategic collaboration with Cohesity, Inc. to develop, operate, and safeguard autonomous AI agents and data with enterprise-grade reliability. The company was formerly known as Service-now.com and changed its name to ServiceNow, Inc. in May 2012. ServiceNow, Inc. was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in Santa Clara, California.

judgment.summary: ServiceNow is a growing software company with strong margins and free cash flow, but trades at a high valuation and shows decelerating earnings growth.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter EPS was in line with estimates; next earnings date is 2026-07-22.
positives: Revenue growth 22.1% YoY indicates strong top-line expansion.
Gross margin 76.6% and Operating margin 13.3% demonstrate efficient operations.
Free cash flow $5.11B TTM is substantial and covers debt.
Analyst consensus is strong buy with a mean target of $142.77.
negatives: Trailing P/E of 60.86 and Price/Sales of 7.51 suggest a high valuation.
Earnings growth of 2.3% YoY is significantly slower than revenue growth.
Current ratio of 0.84 and Quick ratio of 0.69 indicate potential short-term liquidity concerns.
Debt/Equity ratio of 20.73 is high, though offset by strong cash flow.

news.paragraph: Recent news for ServiceNow (NOW) is dominated by unrelated headlines, including Disney World's summer offerings, commentary on housing affordability, a historical firearm auction, and a telecom service expansion. There is no ticker-specific news in the provided articles that would impact ServiceNow's business or stock performance. The next earnings date is July 22nd.
